prestazioni: Engine swap to a Fiat/Lancia 2.0L Twin-Cam (engine code: **131A2.000**) with forged internals: JE Pistons 87.5mm forged slugs (9.5:1 CR), Cunningham conrods, and a billet crankshaft from **JE Motorsport** for 8,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbo (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial 44mm wastegate** for 280-300 HP on **98 RON fuel** with a **Link G4+ Xtreme** standalone ECU managing sequential fuel injection via **ID1000 injectors** and **Bosch 044 fuel pump**.

Full **Group 4 homologation-spec** drivetrain: **Hewland FT200 5-speed dogbox** with **Quaife ATB differential**, **GKN CV joints**, and **Penske 8760 coilovers** (revalved for 131’s 2,490mm wheelbase) with **Eibach ERS springs** (400 lb/in front, 350 lb/in rear). Braking via **AP Racing CP5266 calipers** (4-pot front, 2-pot rear) with **330mm slotted rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**.

Exhaust system: **Scorpion 3.5-inch stainless steel headers** (equal-length, 4-2-1 merge) with a **SuperSprint 76mm center silencer** and **Remus 90mm titanium exit** for 1,200°C heat resistance. Pair with a **Tial 50mm BOV** and **Samco Sport silicone hoses** (blue, FIAT OEM-spec clamps) for boost stability up to 1.5 bar.
estetica: Bodywork: **Brooklands Green** respray (FIAT’s original **Verde Brooklands 445**) with **Rallyart 131 Abarth Group 4 replica fiberglass** (hood, fenders, doors) and **Zender front splitter** (25mm overhang). **OMP 80s-era FIA-spec bolt-on wheel arches** (riveted aluminum) and **Recaro SRD seats** (Houndstooth fabric, FIA-approved) with **Sabelt 6-point harnesses**.

Wheels: **Compomotive CXR 15x8 ET20** (80s WRC replica) with **Pirelli P7 Corsa 205/50R15** tires (N3 compound). **BBS RS 15x7 ET15** (gold centers) for street use with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** (195/50R15). **OZ Racing Ultraleggera 16x8 ET25** (for track) with **Hoosier R7 slicks**.

Aero: **Rally Designs 131 Abarth rear wing** (30mm chord, carbon fiber) with **Sparco side skirts** (fiberglass, 1978 Stradale spec). **Hella Rallye 3000 headlights** (H4 bulbs, Cibie covers) and **Carello fog lights** (yellow lenses, H3 bulbs). **FIA-spec aluminum sump guard** (3mm thick, **Sparco** part #SP131-001) and **OMP fire extinguisher system** (2.5kg plumbed, **FIA-approved**).
